description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7.11 Docker image. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, caches the vendor directory, installs Lektor with pip, builds the site with lektor build --output-path public, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. The job should store the public directory as an artifact and use the default Pages deployment target.
